statement: In every magma, Equation 131 (`x = y * ((y * z) * y)`) implies Equation 1282 (`x = y * (((x * x) * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0105
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y z) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x x) z) y))
